exemplarSeed.label: Bright Lime
exemplarSeed.note: Canonical hard case: luminous yellow-green seed with extreme high-lightness chroma.

references.notes: Bright yellow-green family reference with clean, leafy darks.
Warm yellow-side counterweight for the lime family.

seed.label: Bright Lime
seed.note: Canonical hard case: luminous yellow-green seed with extreme high-lightness chroma.

exemplarSeed.label: Phthalo Green
exemplarSeed.note: Cool deep green between green and cyan; useful for path-family blending pressure.

references.notes: Cool deep green reference close to the canonical phthalo seed.
Blue-green counterweight so the family can stay cool in the shadows.

seed.label: Phthalo Green
seed.note: Cool deep green between green and cyan; useful for path-family blending pressure.

exemplarSeed.label: Cyan
exemplarSeed.note: High-energy cyan where gamut geometry shifts quickly between highlights and shadows.

references.notes: Clean cyan reference with cool, bluer darks.
Higher-energy cyan reference with vivid midtones and inky shadows.

seed.label: Cyan
seed.note: High-energy cyan where gamut geometry shifts quickly between highlights and shadows.

exemplarSeed.label: Ultramarine
exemplarSeed.note: Deep vivid blue seed that tests dark retention and blue highlight presence.

references.notes: Blue-side ultramarine reference with strong colored highlights.

seed.label: Ultramarine
seed.note: Deep vivid blue seed that tests dark retention and blue highlight presence.

exemplarSeed.label: Violet
exemplarSeed.note: Mid-dark vivid violet that often wants richer mids and inkier shadows.

references.notes: Blue-violet reference that keeps the upper mids saturated without drifting magenta.
Magenta-side counterweight so violet ramps can hold the seed's red bias.

seed.label: Violet
seed.note: Mid-dark vivid violet that often wants richer mids and inkier shadows.

exemplarSeed.label: Warm Neutral
exemplarSeed.note: Warm gray / bone family for neutral-specific behavior and temperature handling.

references.notes: Cool neutral structure reference with more visible chroma in the mids.
Cool neutral reference with blue-gray bias.
Warm neutral reference with bone-to-umber progression.

seed.label: Warm Neutral
seed.note: Warm gray / bone family for neutral-specific behavior and temperature handling.
